description: Black wallet, has a flap with a press button closure, textured exterior with a brand logo and metal binding on flapHas two compartmentsFivenbsp; card slots and two slip pockets on the left fold, additional flap attached on the left features a ID card holder and five card holders Zipped compartment and slip pocket on centre foldTransparent slot on right foldZipped pocket at the backWarranty: 180 daysWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
